chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.55 of 2021 Abdu Basit Godil & another Versus Paramount Associates & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 944/21 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 945/21 Dated: 01.02.2024 Mr. Abdul Razzak for appellants. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellants, on instructions, does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
